variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on 2026-02-01 in degrees Celsius.

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on 2026-02-08 in degrees Celsius.

variables.name: enso_index_value
variables.description: The Oceanic Niño Index (ONI) value for the DJF period, indicating El Niño or La Niña conditions which influence regional temperatures in the Indian Ocean.

variables.name: tropical_cyclone_presence
variables.description: Whether a tropical cyclone or significant low-pressure system is active within 500km of Mayotte between Feb 1 and Feb 8, which typically causes temperature drops due to cloud cover and rain.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: published_clinical_efficacy
variables.description: The percentage reduction in cavity formation reported in peer-reviewed clinical studies or formal trials of Lumina's S. mutans BCS3-L1 strain after 24-48 months.

variables.name: strain_colonization_persistence
variables.description: The percentage of treated subjects who maintain measurable levels of the probiotic strain BCS3-L1 in their oral microbiome 24 months post-application.

variables.name: fda_clearance_status
variables.description: Whether the Lumina probiotic has received FDA clearance or equivalent regulatory approval as a therapeutic or preventive treatment for dental caries.

variables.name: long_term_safety_profile
variables.description: Whether any significant adverse events or ecological disruptions in the oral microbiome have been formally reported that would halt long-term use or study of the treatment.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: num_joint_military_drills
variables.description: The number of joint military exercises involving at least three of the specified MENA states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) between February 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: maritime_security_task_force_expansion
variables.description: Whether a formal expansion or new sub-regional task force for maritime security (e.g., Red Sea or Mediterranean) is established involving Egypt, Jordan, and at least one other specified MENA state.

variables.name: gcc_defense_integration_index
variables.description: The number of official GCC ministerial-level meetings (Defense or Interior) specifically addressing the 'Joint Defense Agreement' implementation between February 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: maghreb_security_summit_held
variables.description: Whether a formal security summit occurs between Algeria, Tunisia, and Libya (or other Maghreb states) to address border security or counter-terrorism coordination.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_other
variables.description: Whether a player other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner won the 2026 Australian Open (which concludes on the forecast date).

variables.name: combined_majors_participation_rate
variables.description: The total number of 2026 Grand Slam tournaments (French Open, Wimbledon, US Open) where both Alcaraz and Sinner are in the starting draw.

variables.name: novak_djokovic_top_4_finish_count
variables.description: Number of 2026 Grand Slam tournaments where Novak Djokovic reaches at least the semi-finals.

variables.name: top_5_atp_points_gap
variables.description: The average ranking point lead the world #1 and #2 have over the world #3, #4, and #5 at the start of the 2026 French Open, divided by 1000.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_baseline_battles
variables.description: The 30-day average number of 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01.

variables.name: yemen_ceasefire_status
variables.description: Whether a formal or de facto ceasefire between the Houthi movement and the Saudi-led coalition is active during the target window.

variables.name: cross_border_ground_incursions
variables.description: The number of reported ground-based 'Battles' involving foreign forces or non-state actors (e.g., Houthis) within Saudi territory during the 30-day period ending 2026-02-08.

variables.name: internal_armed_insurgency_events
variables.description: The count of 'Battles' involving domestic armed groups or militant cells (e.g., AQAP or IS branches) against Saudi security forces in the target 30-day window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the federal funds rate target (in percentage points) between February 1, 2026, and May 1, 2026. Lowering rates reduces political friction.

variables.name: doj_legal_opinion_issued
variables.description: Whether the Office of Legal Counsel (OLC) or DOJ issues a formal legal opinion or public memorandum justifying the removal of independent agency heads 'at will' before May 15, 2026.

variables.name: monthly_cpi_inflation_rate
variables.description: The average year-over-year CPI inflation rate reported in the months leading up to the term expiration (Feb-April 2026). High inflation makes firing the Fed chair more politically risky.

variables.name: official_white_house_removal_notice
variables.description: Whether the White House issues an official personnel notice or executive order stating that Jerome Powell is removed, terminated, or replaced prior to the expiration of his term on May 15, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: chasiv_yar_capture
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have captured the entirety of Chasiv Yar. Capture of this high ground is a tactical prerequisite for a direct assault on the Kostyantynivka agglomeration.

variables.name: distance_to_railroad_station
variables.description: The shortest distance from the nearest Russian-controlled territory (per ISW/DeepState) to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: h04_highway_control
variables.description: Whether Russia has established physical control over the section of the H-04 (T0504) highway between Ivanivske and Kostyantynivka, cutting off a primary supply route.

variables.name: russian_daily_advance_rate
variables.description: The average daily rate of territorial gain by Russian forces in the Donetsk sector during the month of February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: final_pccp_guidance_published
variables.description: Whether the FDA has published a final version of the guidance for Predetermined Change Control Plans (PCCP) for AI/ML-enabled medical devices, providing a clearer regulatory pathway for iterative models like LLMs.

variables.name: ai_ml_device_authorizations_count
variables.description: The total number of AI/ML-enabled medical devices authorized by the FDA (De Novo or 510(k) clearance) between February 2025 and March 2026, indicating the general pace of AI regulatory throughput.

variables.name: llm_specific_regulatory_white_paper
variables.description: Whether the FDA releases a formal discussion paper, white paper, or draft guidance specifically addressing the unique safety and performance challenges of Large Language Models (LLMs) or Generative AI in medical devices.

variables.name: public_llm_presubmission_count
variables.description: The estimated number of companies publicly disclosing that they have entered the FDA pre-submission process or have active clinical trials for a medical device that explicitly identifies an LLM as a core component of its functionality.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: baseline_elo_rating
variables.description: Rameshbabu Praggnanandhaa's FIDE Elo rating as listed on Wikipedia on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: january_tournament_performance
variables.description: Total rating points gained or lost by Praggnanandhaa in FIDE-rated games played in late January 2026 (e.g., Tata Steel Chess), which would reflect in the February list.

variables.name: wikipedia_update_latency
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page has been successfully updated with the official February 2026 FIDE rating list by the resolution date of 2026-02-08.

variables.name: required_rating_gain
variables.description: The absolute increase in Elo points required to achieve at least a 1% gain relative to his 2026-02-01 rating.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: wti_crude_price_volatility
variables.description: The annualized 7-day rolling standard deviation of daily returns for WTI Crude Oil futures leading up to Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical event in a major oil-producing region (e.g., Middle East) between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: weekly_change_vix_index
variables.description: The absolute change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026, representing broader market sentiment.

variables.name: opec_policy_shift_announcement
variables.description: Whether OPEC+ announces or leaks an unexpected change in production quotas or strategy during the forecast week.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: nao_index_weekly_trend
variables.description: The North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index value during the first week of February 2026, which significantly influences winter weather patterns in Western Europe.

variables.name: regional_temperature_anomaly
variables.description: The deviation of the 7-day mean temperature (Feb 1 to Feb 7) from the 30-year climatological norm for the Auvergne region.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: weekly_inventory_change
variables.description: The change in US commercial crude oil inventories (excluding SPR) reported by the EIA for the week ending nearest to 2026-02-06, in units of 10 million barrels.

variables.name: opec_plus_production_shift
variables.description: Whether OPEC+ announces or implements an unexpected supply cut or extension of cuts during the period between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_index_delta
variables.description: The change in a standardized geopolitical risk index or a proxy (like the Brent-WTI spread) reflecting supply disruption risks in the Middle East or Eastern Europe over the target week.

variables.name: usd_index_movement
variables.description: The percentage change in the ICE U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, which typically has an inverse relationship with oil prices.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil between the market close on 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: xom_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between reported EPS and consensus analyst estimate for Exxon Mobil's Q4 2025 earnings, typically released in late January or early February 2026.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from the close on 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-08, reflecting broader market sentiment.

variables.name: major_geopolitical_supply_disruption
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical event between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08 that causes a spike in global energy prices (e.g., conflict in a major oil-producing region).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_2028
variables.description: The stock price of Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) as of late 2028, adjusted for any splits, which accounts for the majority of Musk's net worth.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_2028
variables.description: The private market valuation of SpaceX by late 2028, reflecting its growth in Starlink and Starship capabilities.

variables.name: tesla_optimus_commercial_viability
variables.description: Whether Tesla has successfully begun high-volume commercial sales or internal deployment of the Optimus humanoid robot, a key driver for 'trillion-dollar' valuations.

variables.name: musk_compensation_plan_validity
variables.description: The legal status and retention of Musk's 2018 (or subsequent) performance-based stock option packages following all court appeals and re-votes.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, reflecting broad market sentiment.

variables.name: crl_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The percentage difference between reported earnings per share and analyst consensus for CRL's most recent quarterly earnings report prior to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: biotech_sector_performance
variables.description: The weekly percentage change of the iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: crl_guidance_revision
variables.description: Whether Charles River Laboratories issued a formal upward revision to its full-year revenue or profit guidance in the 30 days leading up to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: doj_formal_indictment_obama
variables.description: Whether the U.S. Department of Justice or a state-level prosecutor has unsealed a formal indictment against Barack Obama by June 1, 2026.

variables.name: trump_approval_rating_june2026
variables.description: The FiveThirtyEight average presidential approval rating for Donald Trump on June 1, 2026, reflecting his political capital to pursue unprecedented legal actions.

variables.name: scotus_presidential_immunity_clarification
variables.description: Whether the Supreme Court of the United States issues a ruling or clarification before July 2026 that further restricts the scope of criminal immunity for former presidents' official acts.

variables.name: dni_public_evidence_release_count
variables.description: The number of distinct declassified documents or evidence packets released by the ODNI specifically detailing 'treasonous' acts by the Obama administration between Feb 2026 and July 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: wagner_moura_sag_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. SAG wins are highly predictive of Oscar outcomes.

variables.name: betting_market_implied_probability
variables.description: The average implied probability of Wagner Moura winning Best Actor across major betting exchanges (e.g., Betfair, Smarkets) as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026, indicating strong support from the international wing of the Academy.

variables.name: competitor_precursor_sweep
variables.description: The number of major televised precursor awards (SAG, BAFTA, Critics' Choice) won by a single competing nominee (Chalamet, DiCaprio, Hawke, or Jordan), indicating a frontrunner sweep that would block Moura.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: bamako_supply_route_closure
variables.description: The average number of days per week that the two main supply routes to Bamako (from Senegal and Côte d'Ivoire) are completely impassable due to JNIM activity.

variables.name: africa_corps_presence_mali
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel active in Mali as of May 1, 2026.

variables.name: bamako_airport_operational_status
variables.description: Whether Modibo Keita International Airport (BKO) in Bamako remains under the full operational control of the Malian government and open to commercial/military flights on May 1, 2026.

variables.name: jnim_urban_offensive_incidents
variables.description: The total number of distinct JNIM-led kinetic attacks occurring within the Bamako city limits between February 15, 2026, and June 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether the European Broadcasting Union (EBU) officially confirms Israel's participation in the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest despite potential political boycotts or security concerns.

variables.name: israel_betting_odds_rank
variables.description: Israel's rank in the aggregate betting market odds for winning Eurovision 2026 one week prior to the final. A lower rank (e.g., 1) indicates a higher perceived probability of winning.

variables.name: israel_televote_score_ratio
variables.description: The ratio of points Israel receives from the public televote relative to the maximum possible televote points available in the Grand Final (e.g., 10.0 representing 100% of available televote points).

variables.name: israel_jury_score_rank
variables.description: The rank of Israel's entry based solely on the professional jury votes in the Grand Final (e.g., 1 if they receive the most jury points).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_arena_score_gap
variables.description: The difference in Arena Score between Alibaba's top model (Qwen series) and the current #1 ranked model on the LMSYS Leaderboard as of Feb 2026.

variables.name: alibaba_top_1_status
variables.description: Whether an Alibaba-owned model (e.g., Qwen) has occupied the #1 spot on the LMSYS leaderboard at any point between now and Feb 28, 2026.

variables.name: major_competitor_release_count
variables.description: The number of major foundational model releases (GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini 2, etc.) from OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google between now and Feb 2026.

variables.name: china_compute_restriction_impact
variables.description: Whether new or existing export controls significantly hindered Alibaba's ability to train a frontier-class model exceeding 10^26 FLOPs before the deadline.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_protests
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan recorded by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15. This determines the baseline for the resolution threshold.

variables.name: parliamentary_election_unrest
variables.description: Whether a major national election (parliamentary or presidential) or a significant constitutional referendum is officially scheduled or occurs in Azerbaijan between 2026-01-01 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: economic_misery_index_delta
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in the consumer price index (inflation) in Azerbaijan as of early 2026, which often correlates with public dissent.

variables.name: state_security_crackdown_intensity
variables.description: A measure of whether the Azerbaijani government has implemented new restrictive NGO laws or arrested more than 5 high-profile opposition figures in the 6 months leading up to the target date, which typically suppresses protest frequency.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: avg_temp_feb_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on February 15, 2026.

variables.name: climatological_temp_trend
variables.description: The historical average difference in daily mean temperature between February 22 and February 15 at Brest Bretagne Airport.

variables.name: nao_index_feb_22
variables.description: The North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index value on February 22, 2026, which strongly influences winter temperatures in Western France.

variables.name: marine_air_mass_dominance
variables.description: Whether the prevailing air mass over Brittany on February 22, 2026, is primarily maritime (mP or mT) rather than continental (cP), typically leading to milder temperatures.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the European Central Bank's deposit facility rate between February 15 and February 22, 2026, which typically acts as a floor for the €STR.

variables.name: ecb_monetary_policy_meeting_scheduled
variables.description: Whether a Governing Council meeting of the ECB with a scheduled interest rate decision occurs between February 15 and February 22, 2026.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_euro_area
variables.description: The total amount of excess liquidity in the euro area banking system, which inversely correlates with overnight borrowing rate volatility.

variables.name: estr_volatility_historical_week
variables.description: The standard deviation of the daily €STR values over the 7 days preceding February 15, 2026, indicating the likelihood of a movement larger than the typical spread.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_target_change
variables.description: The change in the upper bound of the Federal Funds Target Rate announced by the FOMC between 2026-02-14 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: cpi_surprise_magnitude
variables.description: The difference between the actual and expected year-over-year CPI inflation rate released in the week leading up to 2026-02-22.

variables.name: fomc_hawkish_shift
variables.description: Whether any FOMC statement, minutes, or speeches by the Fed Chair between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22 explicitly signal a more restrictive monetary policy path than previously expected.

variables.name: treasury_bill_auction_yield
variables.description: The high yield result of the most recent 13-week (3-month) Treasury bill auction occurring between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: chikunova_current_record_time
variables.description: The world record time for the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) held by Evgeniia Chikunova as of the forecast date.

variables.name: major_long_course_championships_held
variables.description: The number of major World Aquatics-sanctioned long course championships (e.g., World Championships) occurring between the forecast date and the resolution date.

variables.name: top_challenger_personal_best
variables.description: The fastest 200m breaststroke long course time achieved by the closest active competitor (excluding Chikunova) prior to the resolution date.

variables.name: ratification_of_new_record
variables.description: Whether a faster time than Chikunova's current record has been set and reflected on Wikipedia, including those marked as pending ratification (#).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_phase_attained
variables.description: The highest clinical trial phase (0 to 3) reached by any Heartland virus vaccine candidate by late 2025.

variables.name: fda_fast_track_status
variables.description: Whether any vaccine candidate for Heartland virus has been granted Fast Track or Breakthrough Therapy designation by the FDA.

variables.name: annual_reported_cases
variables.description: The average number of Heartland virus cases reported annually in the United States, indicating the market and public health urgency.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_mention
variables.description: Whether the 'Heartland virus' or 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia pages mention a 'vaccine' in the prevention or treatment sections as of early 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: macao_ggr_growth_february
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) for Macao in February 2026 compared to February 2025.

variables.name: lvs_weekly_price_volatility
variables.description: The annualized historical volatility of LVS stock over the 30 days preceding February 15, 2026, which indicates the expected magnitude of price swings in the forecast week.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on February 15, 2026, and February 22, 2026, reflecting general market sentiment.

variables.name: lvs_earnings_surprise_q4_2025
variables.description: The percentage difference between LVS's reported Earnings Per Share (EPS) and the consensus analyst estimate for the fourth quarter of 2025 (typically reported in late Jan/early Feb 2026).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_veto
variables.description: Whether a draft resolution on Sudan is vetoed by a permanent member of the Security Council between February 15 and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: days_since_last_sudan_resolution
variables.description: Number of days elapsed between the most recent substantive UNSC resolution on Sudan and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: unitams_successor_mandate_proposal
variables.description: Whether a formal proposal for a new UN monitoring or peace-support mission in Sudan (to replace or follow UNITAMS) is officially tabled by the UNSC.

variables.name: sudan_ipc_phase_5_declarations
variables.description: Number of new famine (IPC Phase 5) declarations in regions of Sudan by the Integrated Food Security Phase Classification before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: If Viktor Orbán leads a party in the 2026 Hungarian Election, will he become Prime Minister?

variables.name: fidesz_kdnp_seat_share
variables.description: The percentage of seats won by the Fidesz-KDNP alliance in the 2026 Hungarian National Assembly election.

variables.name: tisza_party_seat_share
variables.description: The percentage of seats won by Péter Magyar’s Tisza Party in the 2026 Hungarian National Assembly election.

variables.name: fidesz_coalition_formed
variables.description: Whether Viktor Orbán's party successfully forms a governing coalition with a majority of seats if they do not win an outright majority.

variables.name: election_integrity_rating
variables.description: The V-Dem Electoral Democracy Index score for Hungary for the year 2026, reflecting the fairness and competitiveness of the electoral process.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Scottish Labour Party be the second largest party in Holyrood after the next election?

variables.name: labour_polling_share_diff
variables.description: The difference in polling percentage between Scottish Labour and the Scottish Conservative Party in the final month before the election.

variables.name: snp_seat_majority_loss
variables.description: Whether the SNP loses enough seats to fall below 50 seats in Holyrood, potentially allowing Labour to overtake them as the largest party (which would resolve this specific question as NO).

variables.name: conservative_seat_total
variables.description: The total number of seats won by the Scottish Conservative Party in the election.

variables.name: labour_surpasses_conservatives_binary
variables.description: Whether Scottish Labour wins more seats than the Scottish Conservatives in the election.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many fatalities in Niue for the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,fatalities
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more fatalities would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_annual_fatalities_niue
variables.description: The total number of fatalities recorded by ACLED in Niue over the 360 days preceding March 1, 2026, used to establish the baseline average.

variables.name: target_period_fatalities
variables.description: The total number of fatalities recorded by ACLED in Niue during the 30-day window from February 6, 2026, to March 7, 2026.

variables.name: significant_civil_unrest_event
variables.description: Occurrence of any ACLED-categorized Riots or Violence against civilians event in Niue during the 30-day target period involving more than 5 people.

variables.name: external_conflict_spillover
variables.description: Whether any organized armed group from outside Niue engages in a 'Battle' or 'Explosion/Remote violence' event within Niue territory during the target window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Roland Garros Airport will be higher on 2026-03-08 than on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: temp_on_2026_03_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Gillot-Aeroport (Roland Garros Airport) on March 1, 2026.

variables.name: temp_climatology_trend_march
variables.description: The historical average daily temperature difference between March 8 and March 1 at Roland Garros Airport (climatological trend).

variables.name: cyclone_activity_indicator
variables.description: Presence of a tropical cyclone or significant low-pressure system near Reunion Island on March 8, 2026, which typically disrupts temperature patterns.

variables.name: enso_index_value
variables.description: The Oceanic Nino Index (ONI) value for the Feb-Mar-Apr period, influencing regional temperature anomalies in the southwest Indian Ocean.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: bamako_encirclement_status
variables.description: Whether JNIM has successfully cut off all major ground supply routes (RN1, RN5, RN6, and RN7) into Bamako for a continuous period of at least 30 days prior to June 1, 2026.

variables.name: russian_troop_presence_level
variables.description: Estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel active in Mali to support the Goita regime.

variables.name: major_military_base_fall
variables.description: Whether JNIM captures and holds the Kati military base (the primary military stronghold near Bamako) for more than 48 hours.

variables.name: malian_fuel_price_inflation
variables.description: The ratio of the average black market fuel price in Bamako compared to the official government-set price in March 2026, indicating the severity of the blockade.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more 'Battles' in Taiwan for the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: (1+2)/12=0.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 1 or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_annual_battle_count
variables.description: The total number of ACLED 'Battles' recorded in Taiwan during the 360 days preceding March 1, 2026.

variables.name: china_taiwan_kinetic_engagement
variables.description: Whether a direct military engagement involving exchange of fire (kinetic) between PRC and ROC forces occurs in the 30 days before March 8, 2026.

variables.name: strategic_developments_count
variables.description: The number of ACLED 'Strategic developments' (e.g., troop movements, threats) in Taiwan in the 60 days preceding March 1, 2026.

variables.name: cross_strait_escalation_index
variables.description: A qualitative assessment of military tension level where 0 is status quo and 10 is active blockade or invasion in the target window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Sacramento Kings have the worst record in the NBA?

variables.name: kings_win_percentage
variables.description: The current winning percentage of the Sacramento Kings as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: sabonis_fox_games_missed
variables.description: The combined number of regular season games missed due to injury by Domantas Sabonis and De'Aaron Fox up to the end of the 2025-2026 season.

variables.name: bottom_team_win_gap
variables.description: The number of wins separating the Sacramento Kings from the team with the current fewest wins in the NBA (a negative number if the Kings have more wins).

variables.name: kings_active_tanking_status
variables.description: Whether the Sacramento Kings have traded away multiple starters for future assets or draft capital by the 2026 trade deadline, indicating a pivot to a 'tanking' strategy.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the weekly value of central bank liquidity swaps held by the Federal Reserve have increased by 2026-03-08 as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: fx_swap_basis_spread
variables.description: The average 3-month cross-currency basis swap spread for major currencies (EUR, JPY, GBP) against the USD; more negative values indicate dollar scarcity.

variables.name: global_financial_stress_index
variables.description: A composite measure of global market volatility and liquidity stress (e.g., St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index).

variables.name: major_central_bank_activation
variables.description: Whether a major central bank (ECB, BoJ, BoE, SNB, or BoC) announces an increase in the frequency or scale of its 7-day dollar-providing operations during the week.

variables.name: prior_week_swap_balance
variables.description: The total value of central bank liquidity swaps held by the Fed on 2026-03-01.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Silver (SI) hit (LOW) $60 by end of June?

variables.name: silver_price_march_2026
variables.description: The official CME settlement price for the Active Month of Silver (SI) futures on March 2, 2026.

variables.name: global_silver_deficit_forecast
variables.description: The projected annual global silver market deficit for 2026 as reported by the Silver Institute or a similar major industry body.

variables.name: us_dollar_index_june_2026
variables.description: The value of the ICE US Dollar Index (DXY) at the end of June 2026.

variables.name: silver_price_breached_50
variables.description: Whether the Active Month Silver (SI) settlement price has reached or exceeded $50.00 at any point between January 1, 2025, and May 31, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Pneumonia by 2026-03-08?

variables.name: wikipedia_pneumonia_vaccine_status
variables.description: Indicates if the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page currently lists 'Vaccine' in the Prevention column for Pneumonia.

variables.name: pneumococcal_vaccine_mention
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia entry for Pneumonia explicitly links to or mentions the Pneumococcal vaccine as a primary preventative measure.

variables.name: recent_major_vaccine_approvals
variables.description: The number of new vaccines for pathogens causing pneumonia (e.g., RSV, Streptococcus pneumoniae, Hib) approved by major regulators (FDA/EMA) between 2024-01-01 and 2026-03-01.

variables.name: wikipedia_edit_frequency_pneumonia
variables.description: The average number of monthly edits to the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page leading up to the forecast date.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will HPE's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: hpe_earnings_beat_surplus
variables.description: The percentage difference between HPE's reported earnings per share and analyst consensus for the most recent earnings report prior to March 8, 2026.

variables.name: nasdaq_100_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the Nasdaq-100 Index (NDX) between the market close on March 1, 2026, and March 8, 2026, reflecting sector-wide sentiment.

variables.name: ai_server_revenue_growth
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage growth rate of HPE's AI-optimized server revenue as reported in the financial statement immediately preceding the target date.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: Whether the Federal Reserve increased the target range for the federal funds rate in the 30 days leading up to March 8, 2026, impacting discount rates for tech stocks.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: arab_league_security_summits
variables.description: Number of Arab League or regional summits held before June 2026 where defense or collective security is a primary agenda item.

variables.name: maritime_security_task_force_expansion
variables.description: Whether a new or expanded regional maritime security task force (separate from US-led CMF) is established involving at least three of the listed MENA states.

variables.name: joint_military_exercise_participation
variables.description: The number of large-scale multilateral military exercises conducted exclusively or primarily by MENA states (excluding the four giants) in 2025 and H1 2026.

variables.name: formal_security_mou_drafting
variables.description: Public confirmation or credible reporting that a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) on intelligence sharing or joint border security is being drafted by a bloc like the GCC or a subset of North African states.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the effective yield of securities with an investment grade rating of B in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by 2026-03-08 as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: change_in_10y_treasury_yield
variables.description: The change in the market yield on U.S. Treasury securities at 10-year constant maturity between March 1 and March 8, 2026. High-yield corporate bonds often correlate with moves in the risk-free rate.

variables.name: ice_bofa_b_option_adjusted_spread
variables.description: The change in the option-adjusted spread (OAS) for the ICE BofA B US High Yield Index during the target week. Yields increase if credit spreads widen relative to Treasuries.

variables.name: vix_index_weekly_change
variables.description: The change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) between March 1 and March 8, 2026. Higher market volatility typically correlates with higher yields for below-investment-grade debt.

variables.name: fomc_meeting_or_minutes_release
variables.description: Whether a Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting occurs or meeting minutes are released during the week of March 1 to March 8, 2026, which could significantly impact yield expectations.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Germany become more authoritarian in 2025?

variables.name: afd_vote_share_2025
variables.description: The national vote share percentage of the Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) in the 2025 German federal election.

variables.name: civil_liberties_score_decline
variables.description: Whether the 'Civil liberties' sub-score of the Economist Intelligence Unit's Democracy Index for Germany decreases in the 2025 report compared to 2024.

variables.name: political_participation_score
variables.description: The score for the 'Political participation' category in the EIU Democracy Index for Germany in the 2025 report.

variables.name: federal_constitutional_court_intervention
variables.description: Whether the German Federal Constitutional Court issues a major ruling in 2025 striking down government legislation on the grounds of violating fundamental democratic rights or privacy.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from the close on 2026-03-01 to the close on 2026-03-08. BlackRock's stock price is highly correlated with broader market performance.

variables.name: blk_30_day_volatility
variables.description: The annualized standard deviation of daily returns for BLK over the 30 days preceding 2026-03-01. Higher volatility increases the probability of significant price swings in a one-week window.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change_expectation
variables.description: The change in the implied federal funds rate for the next FOMC meeting based on 30-Day Fed Funds Futures between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08. Interest rate expectations significantly impact asset managers.

variables.name: major_market_correction_event
variables.description: Whether a major market correction (defined as a single-day drop of >3% in the S&P 500) occurs between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market capitalization for USDT & USDC stablecoins surpass $300 billion USD by June 30, 2026?

variables.name: crypto_total_market_cap
variables.description: The total market capitalization of all cryptocurrencies as of June 1, 2026. Stablecoin demand is highly correlated with overall crypto market activity and valuation.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_june_2026
variables.description: The upper bound of the Federal Reserve's target range for the federal funds rate. Lower rates generally increase liquidity and risk appetite for digital assets.

variables.name: us_stablecoin_legislation_passed
variables.description: Whether a comprehensive U.0.S. federal regulatory framework for stablecoins (e.g., Lummis-Gillibrand or similar) has been signed into law, providing institutional clarity.

variables.name: usdt_usdc_combined_market_cap_growth_rate
variables.description: The annualized percentage growth rate of the combined USDT and USDC market capitalization from March 2025 to June 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will any branch of the U.S. military have hypersonic weapons operationally deployed with field units, aboard naval vessels, or on aircraft by 30 April 2026?

variables.name: army_lrhw_missile_delivery_completion
variables.description: Whether the U.S. Army has officially confirmed the delivery of the complete initial loadout of eight live missiles to the 5th Battalion, 3rd Field Artillery Regiment by March 31, 2026.

variables.name: successful_lrhw_end_to_end_tests
variables.description: The total number of successful end-to-end flight tests of the Dark Eagle/LRHW system conducted between January 1, 2025, and April 1, 2026.

variables.name: secarmy_ioc_declaration
variables.description: Whether the Secretary of the Army or the Chief of Staff of the Army has issued a public statement or testimony declaring Initial Operational Capability (IOC) for the Long-Range Hypersonic Weapon (LRHW).

variables.name: fy2026_hypersonic_procurement_funding
variables.description: The total enacted procurement funding for hypersonic weapon systems (LRHW, CPS, and HACM) in the FY2026 Department of Defense budget, indicating a transition from R&D to fielding.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Bank of England decreases interest rates by 25 bps after March 2026 meeting?

variables.name: uk_cpi_inflation_yoy
variables.description: The annual Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate in the UK as reported in the February 2026 data release.

variables.name: boe_bank_rate_pre_march
variables.description: The Bank of England official Bank Rate immediately prior to the March 2026 meeting.

variables.name: uk_gdp_growth_q4_2025
variables.description: The quarterly GDP growth rate for the UK in the final quarter of 2025, indicating economic momentum leading into 2026.

variables.name: mpc_dovish_tilt
variables.description: Whether the majority of the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) members signaled a preference for further easing in the February 2026 meeting minutes.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Ajaccio will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: ajaccio_temp_march_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Ajaccio weather station on March 15, 2026.

variables.name: ajaccio_temp_march_22
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Ajaccio weather station on March 22, 2026.

variables.name: seasonal_warming_trend
variables.description: The historical average difference in daily mean temperature between March 22 and March 15 in Ajaccio based on climatological data.

variables.name: passage_of_cold_front
variables.description: Whether a significant cold front or low-pressure system is forecast to pass over Corsica between March 20 and March 22, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the average Arctic sea ice extent for March 2026 be the lowest on record for that month according to the National Snow and Ice Data Center (NSIDC)?

variables.name: february_2026_extent_anomaly
variables.description: The difference between the February 2026 average Arctic sea ice extent and the 1981-2010 February average, indicating the starting state for March.

variables.name: arctic_oscillation_index_march
variables.description: The average value of the Arctic Oscillation index during March 2026; a strongly positive AO often correlates with lower ice extent due to wind patterns.

variables.name: lanina_conditions_present
variables.description: Whether La Nina conditions are officially present according to NOAA (ONI < -0.5) in early 2026, which can influence global temperature and Arctic weather patterns.

variables.name: march_1st_daily_extent
variables.description: The daily Arctic sea ice extent on March 1, 2026, as reported by NSIDC, serving as the baseline for the monthly average.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Dominican Republic win the 2026 World Baseball Classic?

variables.name: dr_roster_star_availability
variables.description: The percentage of active MLB All-Stars from the Dominican Republic (from the 2025 season) who are included on the final 2026 WBC roster, reflecting the team's top-tier talent participation.

variables.name: dr_advances_to_semifinals
variables.description: Whether the Dominican Republic team successfully advances past the quarterfinal round into the championship round (semifinals) of the 2026 WBC.

variables.name: japan_usa_elimination_status
variables.description: The number of top-ranked competitors (specifically Japan and USA) that are eliminated from the tournament before the final match, increasing the Dominican Republic's win probability.

variables.name: dr_pool_play_standing
variables.description: The final rank of the Dominican Republic within their specific opening round pool (e.g., 1st, 2nd, etc.), where a higher rank usually indicates a more favorable seed in the knockout stage.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Explosions/Remote violence' in Sao Tome and Principe for the 30 days before 2026-03-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Explosions/Remote violence'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Explosions/Remote violence' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_explosions_360d
variables.description: Total number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events recorded in Sao Tome and Principe by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-03-15.

variables.name: recent_political_instability_index
variables.description: A measure of reported coup attempts, major political arrests, or constitutional crises in Sao Tome and Principe in the 6 months prior to the target window.

variables.name: reported_arms_trafficking_activity
variables.description: Evidence or reports of illegal arms shipments or explosive material seizures within the Gulf of Guinea targeting Sao Tome and Principe in the year preceding the target date.

variables.name: regional_conflict_spillover
variables.description: Occurrence of explosive-based attacks by militant groups in neighboring Gulf of Guinea states (e.g., Nigeria, Cameroon) that directly involve Sao Tomean maritime or land territory.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Troyes-Barberey Airport will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: temp_avg_march_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at Troyes-Barberey Airport on 2026-03-15.

variables.name: march_temp_trend
variables.description: The historical average daily temperature increase between March 15 and March 22 in Troyes over the last 30 years.

variables.name: blocking_high_presence
variables.description: Presence of a high-pressure blocking system over Western Europe on 2026-03-22 favoring warmer air advection.

variables.name: geopotential_height_anomaly
variables.description: The 500hPa geopotential height anomaly over Northern France on 2026-03-22 (standardized).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the 4-week moving average of initial unemployment claims have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: latest_weekly_initial_claims
variables.description: The number of initial unemployment claims (seasonally adjusted) for the week ending March 21, 2026.

variables.name: claims_drop_off_value
variables.description: The number of initial unemployment claims for the week ending February 21, 2026, which will be dropped from the 4-week moving average calculation.

variables.name: sahm_rule_recession_indicator
variables.description: Whether the Sahm Rule Recession Indicator is above 0.50 percentage points as of March 2026, indicating a potential upward trend in unemployment.

variables.name: layoff_announcements_index
variables.description: A measure of large-scale corporate layoff announcements in the two weeks prior to the target date relative to the previous month's average.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will VTRS's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: vtrs_trailing_5day_return
variables.description: The percentage change in Viatris Inc. (VTRS) stock price over the 5 trading days leading up to 2026-03-15, indicating short-term momentum.

variables.name: xlv_weekly_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLV) between 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22, representing broader sector trends.

variables.name: vtrs_earnings_surprise_history
variables.description: The earnings per share (EPS) surprise percentage from the most recent quarterly earnings report prior to March 2026, influencing investor sentiment.

variables.name: major_fda_approval_announcement
variables.description: Whether Viatris or a major direct competitor receives a significant FDA approval or rejection for a key pipeline product (e.g., biosimilar Botox) in the week of 2026-03-15 to 2026-03-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Isosporiasis by 2026-03-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_phase_iii
variables.description: Whether any vaccine candidate for Isosporiasis (Cystoisospora belli) has entered Phase III clinical trials by 2026-01-01.

variables.name: isosporiasis_incidence_rate
variables.description: The estimated annual number of reported Isosporiasis cases globally, which influences the economic incentive for vaccine development.

variables.name: fda_ema_approval_count
variables.description: The number of regulatory approvals (FDA or EMA) for protozoan parasite vaccines in humans as of early 2026.

variables.name: wikipedia_list_update_frequency
variables.description: The number of times the 'Vaccine' column in the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page was updated to 'Yes' for any disease in the 12 months prior to the target date.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will DOC's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: xlre_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the Real Estate Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLRE) between the close on March 13, 2026 (the Friday before the start date) and the close on March 20, 2026 (the Friday before the end date).

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_expectation
variables.description: The target upper bound of the Federal Funds Rate as of March 2026, which heavily influences REIT valuations.

variables.name: doc_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) for DOC on March 15, 2026, indicating if the stock is overbought (>70) or oversold (<30).

variables.name: ten_year_treasury_yield_change
variables.description: The absolute change in the 10-Year U.S. Treasury Note yield between March 15 and March 22, 2026. Rising yields often negatively impact REIT prices.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: BTC  close above 80K by end of March?

variables.name: btc_price_march_29
variables.description: The closing price of Bitcoin on March 29, 2026, used to determine the distance to the target in the remaining 2 days.

variables.name: march_30_31_volatility
variables.description: The maximum percentage price increase observed over any 24-hour period during the final two days of March.

variables.name: break_73k_resistance
variables.description: Whether Bitcoin has successfully closed above the key psychological and technical resistance level of $73,300 prior to March 30.

variables.name: spot_etf_net_inflow
variables.description: The net daily inflow into major Bitcoin Spot ETFs during the final week of March, indicating institutional demand strength.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Solana reach $100 in March?

variables.name: sol_price_start_march
variables.description: The closing price of SOL/USDT on Binance at the end of February 28, 2026.

variables.name: sol_already_hit_100
variables.description: Has the SOL/USDT high price on Binance reached or exceeded $100 at any point between March 1, 2026, and the current date of March 29, 2026?

variables.name: btc_price_march_high
variables.description: The highest price reached by Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) on Binance during the month of March 2026.

variables.name: sol_network_outage_march
variables.description: Did the Solana mainnet experience a documented network-wide halt or outage lasting more than 1 hour during March 2026?

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Anthropic be a designated supply chain risk on May 1, 2026?

variables.name: preliminary_injunction_granted
variables.description: Whether a U.S. federal court grants a preliminary injunction or temporary restraining order staying the enforcement of the supply chain risk designation before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: days_until_lawsuit_filing
variables.description: The number of days between March 3, 2026, and the date Anthropic files a legal challenge against the designation.

variables.name: white_house_reversal_likelihood
variables.description: The estimated probability (as reflected in political betting markets or expert consensus) that the Trump administration rescinds the specific 'supply chain risk' designation in favor of a different legal mechanism (e.g., standard contract termination) before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: official_federal_register_publication
variables.description: Whether the designation has been formally published in the Federal Register or an equivalent official government database for procurement exclusions (like SAM.gov) by May 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will China, Russia, the U.S., or the EU publicly announce new economic or trade sanctions that specifically target a state-owned oil or gas entity in Egypt, Jordan, or the United Arab Emirates (UAE) by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: uae_russia_trade_volume
variables.description: The annual trade volume between the UAE and Russia in billions of USD, serving as a proxy for financial ties that might trigger Western secondary sanctions.

variables.name: secondary_sanctions_expansion
variables.description: Has the U.S. or EU expanded secondary sanctions specifically targeting financial facilitators of the Russian energy sector in the Middle East by the resolution date?

variables.name: uae_fatf_status
variables.description: Is the UAE listed on the FATF 'grey list' (jurisdictions under increased monitoring) for deficiencies in anti-money laundering and countering the financing of terrorism?

variables.name: egypt_gas_cooperation_russia
variables.description: Number of new major infrastructure or extraction joint ventures announced between Egyptian state-owned gas entities (like EGAS) and Russian state-owned entities (like Gazprom/Rosneft).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the 30-day average of the Federal Reserve's Secured Overnight Financing Rate have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: fomc_rate_change_march_2026
variables.description: The net change in the target Federal Funds Rate range following the March 2026 FOMC meeting (typically scheduled around mid-March).

variables.name: daily_sofr_volatility_window
variables.description: The average daily change in the raw SOFR rate during the 7-day window from March 15 to March 22, 2026.

variables.name: quarter_end_liquidity_pressure
variables.description: Whether market participants anticipate significant upward pressure on repo rates due to the approaching end of Q1 2026.

variables.name: sofr_30d_avg_momentum
variables.description: The difference between the SOFR 30-day average on 2026-03-15 and its value 7 days prior (2026-03-08), indicating the existing trend.
